description: The lower control row: three smaller controls plus the increment button's downward extension, mirrored for left-handed use with all four sections equal width.
name: BottomControlRow

description: The counter screen. Owns the model and handedness preference, wires the swipe-to-switch gesture, and composes the header, switcher card, giant numeral, and bottom bar.
name: ContentView

description: A small secondary control in the bottom row: a glyph above a mono label.
name: ControlButton

description: The giant numeral showing the active counter's current value.
name: CountHero

description: The whole bottom assembly: increment bar starting one-fifth up from the bottom and extending into the lower control row, computing the equal-quarter column width.
name: CounterBottomBar

description: Grid of selectable color swatches drawn from CounterTheme.palette; the selected key gets a lime ring and binds the chosen colorKey back to the settings panel.
name: CounterColorPicker

description: A single counter-selector dot; the active dot grows and gains a lime ring and glow.
name: CounterDot

description: Observable store backing the counter screen. Loads seeded or default counters and the selected id from UserDefaults at launch, tracks the active selection, and applies increment, subtract with optional clamping when negatives are disallowed, reset, and wrap-around swipe selection, persisting every change back to UserDefaults.
name: CounterModel

description: Inline settings panel that expands over the count numeral. Composes the labeled name field, color picker, step stepper, an allow-negative toggle, and a destructive Delete; local state holds in-progress edits and DONE saves them back to the active counter.
name: CounterSettingsPanel

description: The COUNT BY control: a minus/value/plus stepper that sets how much each increment or subtract changes the count, clamping the lower bound at 1.
name: CounterStepStepper

description: The switcher card: the row of selectable counter dots, the active counter name and swipe hint, and the inert settings gear.
name: CounterSwitcherCard

description: Design-token palette for the counter screen plus pure helpers: dotHex maps a counter colorKey to its hex token with a lime fallback, and rgbComponents parses a hex string into 0...1 RGB channels backing the Color hex initializer.
name: CounterTheme

description: The inert settings gear on the switcher card; settings are deferred.
name: GearButton

description: Top app-chrome row showing the brand name and the NN / 04 COUNTERS position label.
name: HeaderBar

description: The higher row of the increment button: the TAP TO INCREMENT label and the plus, centered over the increment column and mirrored for left-handed use.
name: IncrementBar

description: A labeled section in the settings panel: a small mono caption above its forwarded content, used by the name field and color picker for consistent headings.
name: SettingsField

untestabilityReason.justification: Presentation-only layout wrapper: a caption Text above forwarded content, no branching or iteration.
